115565.description_en_long: Kanayama is a 967 m peak in the Sefuri mountain range straddling Fukuoka and Saga prefectures, about 8 km northwest of the range's highest peak, Mt. Sefuri, and ranking third in elevation after Sefuri and Ihara. The range's fault topography makes the Fukuoka side steep with waterfalls and gorges, drawing many hikers from the Fukuoka metropolitan area.
